name: delete_qor_check
short_description: Delete a user QoR suggestion check
full_help:
delete_qor_check

Description: 
Delete a user QoR suggestion check

Syntax: 
delete_qor_check  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Suggestion ID of user suggestion to delete

Categories: 
Object, Feasibility, Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
